headline: Ameren to Release Q1 Earnings: Here's What You Need to Know
summary: AEE gears up for Q1 results with grid upgrades, AI-driven demand and new rates set to boost earnings, though higher costs may weigh on performance.

headline: American Electric Power to Release Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
summary: AEP's Q1 results may be supported by strong rate-based growth and higher transmission revenues, alongside rate revisions and rising load demand.

headline: Southern Co. (SO) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
summary: Southern Co. (SO) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +9.09% and +3.81%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
